objects.description: [VOID MANTICORE](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1055) has delivered malicious payloads that initiate through user execution to include interaction with a masqueraded file.(Citation: DOJ FBI Handala Hack March 2026)(Citation: FBI IC3 Flash VOID MANTICORE Handala Hack March 2026) [VOID MANTICORE](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1055) has used trojanized application lures to induce targets into executing malware enabling persistent surveillance.(Citation: Domain Tools Handala Hack Karma Homeland Justice MOIS April 2026)
